content:
📊 **AI 科研日报** — 2026年07月02日 周四
> 🔥 Agent工具 + 🚀 推理加速 + 💻 本地部署

## 🔥 GitHub 开源项目精选
1. [Kulaxyz/self-learning-skills](https://github.com/Kulaxyz/self-learning-skills)
   A self-improving skill for AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, AGENTS.md): re | ⭐742
2. [TianhangZhuzth/Fundamental-Ava](https://github.com/TianhangZhuzth/Fundamental-Ava)
   Build digital human beings — autonomous, collaborative, and socially intelligent | ⭐717
3. [revfactory/webtoon-harness](https://github.com/revfactory/webtoon-harness)
   트렌드 조사부터 세로 스크롤 뷰어 완성까지, 웹툰 한 회차를 27개 AI 에이전트 팀이 만들어내는 Claude Code 하네스 | ⭐237
4. [Fdani007/PUBG_Battlegrounds_ESP___Aimbot](https://github.com/Fdani007/PUBG_Battlegrounds_ESP___Aimbot)
   ESP, aimbot, and no recoil for PUBG Battlegrounds. See enemies through walls, au | ⭐222
5. [ahmedkuwity-source/Rainbow_Six_Siege_Wallhack___Aimbot](https://github.com/ahmedkuwity-source/Rainbow_Six_Siege_Wallhack___Aimbot)
   Undetected ESP and aimbot for Rainbow Six Siege. See enemies through walls, auto | ⭐220
6. [cheercheung/Awesome-Blender-Seedance-Workflow-Usecases](https://github.com/cheercheung/Awesome-Blender-Seedance-Workflow-Usecases)
   Curated Blender + Seedance workflows for AI filmmaking: previs, camera control,  | ⭐202
7. [lingbol088-spec/reverse-flow-skill](https://github.com/lingbol088-spec/reverse-flow-skill)
   面向 AI Agent / Codex 的本地 CTF 逆向工程流程技能。加载后通过“真心为你”进入逆向模式，默认在本地沙盒、CTF、crackme、warga | ⭐177
8. [thenicolas1894/awesome-claude-fable-5-prompt-vault](https://github.com/thenicolas1894/awesome-claude-fable-5-prompt-vault)
   Ultimate Claude Fable 5 Guide 2026: Use Cases, Integrations & Benchmarks | ⭐154

## 📈 今日趋势
- Agent + 工具调用持续火热
- 推理效率优化成为焦点
- 多模态模型进展迅速
- 本地部署需求增长
